uplink.description: 8931EX data frame (fPort 5): Z-axis, 2 FFT peaks, 70% battery, 26C
uplink._note: Oracle vector. fPort-5 frame hand-built to upstream Decode8931EX layout; expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (SigRms = dBDecompression(0x0B), peak mags dB-decompressed) and normalizing per the category map. Battery 0xF nibble would mean an error reading (omitted); here low nibble 7 -> 70%.

uplink.description: 8931EX data frame (fPort 5): X-axis, single peak, battery-read error nibble (0xF -> omitted)
uplink._note: Oracle vector. Battery nibble 0xF means the device could not read SoC, so batteryPercent is omitted (matches upstream 'err'). accelerationRms = dBDecompression(60), peak mag = dBDecompression(50).

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (only the 8931EX data frame on fPort 5 is decoded)
uplink._note: Upstream falls through to a catch-all 'Unknown frame' data object; we surface non-data frames as a proper error per the output contract.
